name: Costa Rica

authority.name: MICITT — Dirección de Certificadores de Firma Digital (DCFD)

source.note: Root and CA certificates published by BCCR/MICITT repositories.

notes: Single national hierarchy: one root (CA RAIZ NACIONAL - COSTA RICA) operated by BCCR/SINPE under MICITT accreditation. RSA throughout; OCSP available (ocsp.sinpe.fi.cr).
